products.name: HMC Intelligent Manhole Cover Monitor
products.desc: Smart manhole cover monitor with unauthorized-opening alerts and 24/7 IoT status tracking.
products.overview: The HMC Intelligent Manhole Cover Monitoring Instrument detects unauthorised opening, displacement, vibration, flooding and methane gas accumulation in urban drainage systems. BeiDou / GPS positioning for accurate location tracking. 4G / LoRa communication with 6-year battery life. IP67 waterproof and explosion-proof rated for underground environments.

specs.label: Monitoring (advanced)
specs.value: Tilt / displacement + flooding + water level + methane gas

specs.label: Mechanical lock
specs.value: Customisable (matched with full manhole cover system)

features: Multi-state real-time monitoring: tilt, displacement and vibration sensors detect unauthorised opening — triggers instant audio/visual alert and platform notification
Smart remote control: 4G + Bluetooth communication; remote lock/unlock of cover (integrated-lock variant)
Precise GPS / BeiDou positioning for rapid dispatch to exact fault or missing-cover location
High-strength composite housing (helmet-grade material): impact-resistant, corrosion-resistant; IP67 / IP68
Predictive maintenance: low-battery alarm and self-diagnostic; auto-generates maintenance reports
Flexible expansion: add water-level sensor, CH₄ gas sensor, temperature, humidity as required

products.name: HLL Smart Logistics Locator
products.desc: Smart IoT logistics locator with multi-mode positioning (LBS+BLE+BDS), 4G cloud management, IP65–IP68. For cold chain, circular packaging and high-value cargo tracking.
products.overview: The HLL Smart Logistics Locator is an IoT tracking device for cold chain logistics, high-value cargo and returnable packaging management. BeiDou / GPS / LBS tri-mode positioning. Tilt, shock and temperature sensors. 4G real-time data upload. 7–10 day standby battery life. IP65–IP68 for all-weather operation.

specs.label: Positioning system
specs.value: LBS base station + BeiDou inertial navigation + Bluetooth BLE; BDS (BeiDou) optional

specs.label: Power supply
specs.value: 5× AA alkaline batteries; Li-ion rechargeable optional

features: BeiDou satellite positioning with LBS and BLE supplementary — 1~10m accuracy in open environments
Vibration + tilt sensors for real-time cargo safety: immediate alerts on drops, collisions, tilts or theft attempts
4G real-time data upload to cloud platform and mobile app for live fleet management dashboards
Intelligent BLE low-power mode switching — 7~10 day standby battery life (customisable for longer duration)
AA battery power supply: significantly safer than lithium-ion, reduces fire and hazmat risk for cargo shipments
Custom geo-fencing: automatic alert when cargo leaves defined route or enters/exits a designated zone
API integration: seamlessly connects with existing ERP, WMS and logistics management systems
